summary: Website project using Inter font and Tailwind CSS. Tally forms are being embedded across multiple pages including Contact Us and 1:1 Counseling Session.
architectural_notes: Tally forms are embedded via iframe with dynamic height and the Tally embed.js script
Primary font is Inter, applied via Tailwind CSS configuration

existing_features.title: On the 1:1 Counseling Session page (CounselingPage.tsx), replace the existing native CounselingBookingForm component with the Tally embedded form using the following embed code: iframe with data-tally-src='https://tally.so/embed/EkX2OB?hideTitle=1&dynamicHeight=1', loading='lazy', width='100%', height='897', frameborder='0', marginheight='0', marginwidth='0', title='Counseling Session'. Load the Tally embed script (https://tally.so/widgets/embed.js) dynamically using a useEffect hook that replicates the provided script logic: check if Tally is already defined and call Tally.loadEmbeds(), otherwise inject the script tag if not already present. The existing TallyFormEmbed component (frontend/src/components/forms/TallyFormEmbed.tsx) should be reused or updated to support this embed code pattern if it does not already handle it correctly.

new_feature_requests.summary: Replace native form on 1:1 Counseling Session page with Tally embedded form (EkX2OB)
